title: Why is Unit 02s blood purple
wikitext:
[]: Why is Unit 02's blood purple?             Quote Post by VUX » Thu Jan 18, 2018 9:46 pm That always confused me, is it supposed to symbolize that Asuka is a blue blooded snot?

[]: Re: Why is Unit 02's blood purple?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 26, 2018 3:26 pm There's no canonical answer. Didn't stop me from making shit up for fanfic purposes, regardless.

[]: Re: Why is Unit 02's blood purple?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Apr 07, 2018 12:46 pm My personal theory is that they at some point planned to have something of an antithesis going on: Unit 01: Red blood, purple armor Unit 02: Purple blood, red armor Or maybe so they can reuse the shot from the Zeruel fight at some point, although this seems like a bit of a stretch to me, even if the color shade is pretty much the same

[]: Re: Why is Unit 02's blood purple?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Apr 07, 2018 1:34 pm It's more likely that the "blood red" wouldn't show up on the red armor, so they changed the color so that we could see Unit-02 bleeding.

[]: Re: Why is Unit 02's blood purple?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Apr 07, 2018 2:53 pm DarkBluePhoenix wrote: It's more likely that the "blood red" wouldn't show up on the red armor, so they changed the color so that we could see Unit-02 bleeding.

[]: Re: Why is Unit 02's blood purple?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Apr 07, 2018 3:03 pm DarkBluePhoenix wrote: It's more likely that the "blood red" wouldn't show up on the red armor, so they changed the color so that we could see Unit-02 bleeding.

[]: Re: Why is Unit 02's blood purple?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Apr 07, 2018 3:21 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: If you want to apply Occam's razor to something like this, this would be the simplest and most likely explanation. A blood-red robot bleeding red blood would have looked bad.
